title: COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM - 211info
text: COMMUNITY COUNSELING SOLUTIONS LAKE COUNTY COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a range of support services to individuals experiencing intellectual and/or developmental disabilities. Services can include case management, individual and family support plans, access to brokerage services for transportation, in-home supports or residential placement, and employment and vocational services. 100 N D Street Lakeview, OR 97630 Eligibility: Individuals with an intellectual or developmental disability. Applicant must be an Oregon resident and a U.S. citizen. Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday 8am-3pm (541) 947-0274 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 947-0274 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to request an application for Developmental Disabilities services. An appointment will be scheduled with an eligibility worker who will assist with the application process. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of citizenship, proof of address, and records of any/all psychological and medical assessments related to the disability AREA SERVED: Gilliam, Grant, Lake, Morrow, and Wheeler Counties Services: Benefits and Services Assistance * Disabilities Issues Case/Care Management * Disabilities Issues Disability Related Center Based Employment Disability Related Parenting Programs Disability Related Transportation Home/Community Based Developmental Disabilities Programs Residential Placement Services for People with Disabilities If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COMMUNITY COUNSELING SOLUTIONS LAKE COUNTY
